title: Core Components of a Search User Interface
description: A flowchart depicting the key interactive elements and information flow in a search user interface, from initial query input to final result refinement.
relationships: User enters a query into the Query Input Box which triggers a search
The system returns a ranked Search Results List composed of individual Result Snippets
Faceted Navigation Filters allow the user to narrow down the Results List by metadata categories
Advanced Search Options provide a structured method for building a complex query
Relevance Feedback from the user refines subsequent search results
Pagination Controls allow navigation through multiple pages of results
Search History stores past queries and results for easy retrieval
